index.title: Blog
index.description: Practical notes for Tucsenberg launch readiness: membranes, compatibility, materials, quote flow, deployment, analytics, and content boundaries.

hero.title: Find Your Replacement Membrane
hero.subtitle: Enter a part number, OEM model, or diffuser brand to check compatibility.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by part number or OEM model...

confirm.title: What we help you confirm
confirm.body: We resolve replacement membrane requests against a documented compatibility review, not a brand-name guess.

compatibility.title: OEM fit against your part number
compatibility.body: You send the diffuser part number or OEM model; we match it to the membrane variant the compatibility record already covers, or tell you it needs dimensional verification.

material.title: Material chosen for your wastewater
material.body: EPDM and TPU are scoped to the influent your basin actually sees, so the elastomer decision follows operating conditions rather than a catalog default.

fit.title: Open questions surfaced before the quote
fit.body: If a dimension or fastening detail is unresolved, we flag it in the compatibility review so it is settled before you commit to an order.

membraneType.title: Start from the membrane format you run

disc.name: Disc membranes
disc.body: Fine-bubble disc diffusers on retainer rings — match the disc diameter and fastening to the compatibility record.

tube.name: Tube membranes
tube.body: Tube diffusers on a perforated core — match the tube length and end-fitting to the compatibility record.

oemGrid.title: Replacement Membranes for Major Brands
oemGrid.pathCount: {count, plural, one {# documented compatibility path} other {# documented compatibility paths}}

risks.title: The four risks buyers avoid
risks.body: Replacement membrane orders go wrong in a small number of repeatable ways. Each section of this page is built to close one of them.

wrongFit.title: Ordering a part that does not seat
wrongFit.body: A membrane that is close but not dimensionally matched to the diffuser body leaks or unseats; the compatibility review checks fit before the order, not after.

wrongMaterial.title: Running an elastomer the influent attacks
wrongMaterial.body: Where the basin sees BTEX, solvents, oil, or grease loading, an EPDM membrane chosen by default can swell or harden; the material decision follows the documented influent instead.

blindOrder.title: Quoting from a guessed cross-reference
blindOrder.body: A brand-name lookup with no recorded basis produces a number nobody can defend; here every match is tied to the compatibility record it came from.

shutdownSlip.title: Losing the basin window to a slow reply
shutdownSlip.body: When a line is down, an unanswered RFQ is the real cost; the SLA commitments set when a review and a quote come back.

materials.title: Choose the Material That Matches Your Conditions

overview.title: Membrane compatibility paths
overview.description: Tucsenberg is preparing membrane family, OEM-family compatibility, material guidance, and RFQ intake surfaces for Phase 1.
overview.capabilitiesDescription: This page explains what a buyer can prepare before owner-confirmed product and compatibility data lands.

siteFoundation.title: Membrane site foundation
siteFoundation.description: Membrane, compatibility, material, quote, legal, navigation, and responsive layout surfaces are connected.

replacementSurface.title: Compatibility review surface
replacementSurface.description: OEM family, part number, page copy, SEO, images, and multilingual text have clear places to replace with Tucsenberg facts.

inquiryPath.title: RFQ path
inquiryPath.description: The contact and quote foundations are ready to be connected to a real Tucsenberg intake workflow.

launchPath.title: Launch path
launchPath.description: Cloudflare remains the deployment route, with compatibility and lead proof treated as real launch surfaces.

catalog.technicalProofDescription: The site includes the technical baseline Tucsenberg needs without making the membrane pages developer-facing.

next.title: Next.js app foundation
next.description: App Router, Server Components first, metadata, localized routes, and production build checks.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare/OpenNext deployment path
cloudflare.description: Cloudflare and OpenNext stay the recommended deployment truth for this site.

i18n.title: Multilingual content
i18n.description: English, Spanish, and internal Chinese navigation, page copy, metadata, and article content stay aligned.

quality.title: Quality checks
quality.description: Type, lint, content, component, website, and build checks remain part of the launch path.

security.title: Form security basics
security.description: Contact and inquiry paths include validation, anti-abuse controls, and explicit runtime configuration.

traffic.title: Traffic visibility
traffic.description: Owner-facing traffic information is treated as a real protected surface, not marketing decoration.

boundary.title: Tucsenberg work-in-progress, not a finished product catalog
boundary.description: Real launch still requires owner-confirmed product data, images, contact details, legal copy, secrets, and deployment proof.

compatibility.title: Compatible OEM Models
compatibility.description: This membrane is a planned replacement for the following OEM diffuser models. Confirm dimensions and hardware before ordering.
compatibility.crossRefNote: Numbers shown are OEM or published cross-reference / interchange numbers, not numbers sold by the OEM.

results.empty: No models match the selected filters.

hero.title: Request a Quote
hero.description: Tell us what you need. We review your request and respond within 2 business days.

softEntry.title: Not sure which membrane fits?
softEntry.body: Share your current diffuser brand, model, and dimensions — add photos or wastewater conditions if you have them. We use those details to identify the closest replacement path.

form.partNumbersHint: Enter Tucsenberg SKU, OEM part number, or model name
form.name: Full Name
form.shutdownDateHint: When do you need the membranes installed?
form.fileUpload: Reference a Part List or Photo
form.fileUploadHint: We record the file name for reference only. The file is not sent with this form — have it ready to email when we reply (CSV, PDF, or images, max 10MB).

summary.title: Your Request Summary
summary.empty: Add details to see your request summary

success.title: Quote Request Submitted
success.description: We received your request and will respond to {email} within 2 business days.
success.fileNotice: Your file was not uploaded — only its name was recorded. We'll ask you to email it when we reply.

material.title: Choosing the membrane material

epdm.label: EPDM — default starting point
epdm.condition: Municipal and light industrial wastewater conditions.

tpu.label: TPU — selected by conditions
tpu.condition: Oil, chemical, and high-grease wastewater where EPDM degrades.

material.note: Material is chosen by process conditions, not as a price tier.

batch.title: Batch controls
batch.traceability: Each shipment is checked before dispatch and is traceable by order and production lot.
batch.photos: First production orders can include outgoing photo records on request.
batch.sample: A verification sample is available before the first batch.

trademark.footer: Tucsenberg manufactures aftermarket aeration replacement membranes. {brands} are trademarks of their respective owners. Tucsenberg is not affiliated with, authorized, or endorsed by these companies. Brand and model references describe documented compatibility only.
trademark.brandNotice: {brand} is a trademark of its respective owner. Tucsenberg is an independent aftermarket manufacturer and is not affiliated with, authorized, or endorsed by {brand}. References describe documented compatibility only.
trademark.inline: Brand and model names are trademarks of their respective owners, referenced only to describe documented compatibility.
